name: Forest Admin Internal Tools Builder API
what_it_does: Developer-focused admin panel builder with REST API — enabling backend teams to generate customizable admin interfaces over existing databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Sequelize, TypeORM, Prisma) or REST/GraphQL APIs, with role-based access, custom actions, smart fields, and a hosted admin UI, without building admin UIs from scratch.
use_cases: Building customer management panels via Forest Admin over existing database for support teams
Creating custom admin actions via Forest Admin API for operational workflow automation
Managing Forest Admin roles and permissions via API for team access control
Extending Forest Admin with custom smart fields via API for computed data display
Integrating Forest Admin with existing backend REST/GraphQL APIs for admin panel generation
not_for: Customer-facing applications (Forest Admin is for internal admin users only)
Teams wanting a no-code database (use Airtable or NocoDB for no-code)
Non-technical teams without a backend developer for initial setup
best_when: A startup or scaleup backend team needs a customizable admin panel for their existing database — where Forest Admin's smart field system, custom actions, and role-based access provide enterprise admin features without months of custom development.
avoid_when: You need customer-facing UI, have no backend database to connect to, or prefer fully managed no-code tools without developer setup.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for Forest Admin cloud authentication. Agent auth token between Forest Admin backend and Forest Admin cloud. Per-environment API secrets. Role-based access control (RBAC) with team-level and record-level permissions. Webhook (smart actions) for custom server-side actions. SDKs (Agents) for Node.js, Rails, Django, Laravel, Flask, .NET. Forest Admin Cloud manages auth — agent handles data.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pro $109/month (unlimited users, basic features); Premium $349/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: French company (Paris). Founded 2015 by Sandro Munda and Nicolas Renaux. Raised $8M seed (2020). 3,000+ companies. Used by: startups, SaaS companies, agencies. Agent-based architecture: Forest Admin agent in your backend communicates with Forest Admin cloud UI. No data stored in Forest Admin — data stays in your database. Environments: development, staging, production. Custom smart actions: one-click workflows, approval processes. Segments for data filtering. Charts and dashboards. Very popular in French startup ecosystem.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API via Forest Admin agent. OAuth2 auth. Smart actions (webhooks) for custom operations. SDKs for 6 frameworks. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. Free plan for 5 users. Agent architecture — data never leaves your infrastructure. Good documentation. French company.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Record reads idempotent via underlying database. Smart actions require custom idempotency. Role/team reads idempotent. Data reflects underlying database state.
known_agent_gotchas: Agent-based architecture — Forest Admin backend agent must be running in your infrastructure
Data stays in your database — Forest Admin cloud only serves the UI (good for data sovereignty)
Smart actions trigger server-side code in YOUR backend — configure action endpoints
Per-environment secrets — development, staging, production use different secrets
French company with EU data residency preference — verify for US-only requirements

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. OAuth2 with RBAC. Data stays in user's database (agent architecture) — Forest Admin only serves UI. Per-environment secrets. Record-level permissions available. Role and team-based access control. French company with GDPR-first design. No data stored in Forest Admin cloud (data sovereignty). Smart action webhooks use server-side code.
